note: Context-scoped floor escape: the body keeps min-height 150px everywhere except inside the modal editor. A min-height-none word on the body would lose to that components-layer base — the Phase C layer finding — so the contextual zero stays local.

Context-scoped floor escape: the editor-content recipe base keeps min-height 150px; inside the modal editor the wrapper must collapse. A min-height-none word loses to the skin-layer base (the Phase C layer finding), so the contextual zero stays local.

Left-only positioned menu pin. The nearest admitted word is stretch-inline, but that would also emit right: 0 and change the dropdown from left-pinned/hugging to stretched, so this one-sided component placement stays local until a one-edge pin word is ruled.
